Thanks for contributing to keras.io! Please fill out the sections below —
this helps reviewers understand and merge your PR faster.
-->

## What does this PR do?

<!-- One or two sentences describing the change. Link the related issue, if any (e.g. "Fixes #1234"). -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New code example
- [ ] Fix to an existing code example
- [ ] Documentation / guide update
- [ ] Other (repo tooling, templates, etc.)

## Checklist

- [ ] I've read the [contributor guide](../contributor_guide.md) (required for new/modified code examples).
- [ ] **If this is a new example**: this PR contains only the `.py` file — no generated `ipynb`/`md`/`img` files yet.
- [ ] **If this is a typo/simple fix to an existing example**: this PR updates the `.py`, `.md`, and `.ipynb` files together.
- [ ] **If this is a substantial fix to an existing example**: this PR contains only the `.py` file.
- [ ] I ran `python autogen.py add_example <path/to/example>` locally and it built without errors or timeouts (for code examples only).
- [ ] I did not hand-edit any autogenerated files (`site/*`, `sources/*`, `templates/examples/*`, `templates/guides/*`, `examples/*/md,ipynb,img/*`, `guides/md,ipynb,img/*`).

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything else reviewers should know: open questions, things you're unsure about, etc. -->
